title: Configured intent replay capability is omitted by config generation and aggregate loading
source: current-session in-boundary buildvcs RED->fix->GREEN on the required replay E2E + non-disruptive aggregate-loader source revert-reverify + broad assistant-package E2E; root-cause SST wiring is the committed 8ac848e1 (ancestor of HEAD)

createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. The root-cause SST wiring (both missing integration edges) is already the committed 8ac848e1 (scripts/commands/config.sh +14 emits all five intent-trace keys; internal/config/assistant.go +5 calls loadIntentTraceConfig(cfg, &errs)), verified ancestor of HEAD 3f3a3938. implement is this session's single in-boundary fix: tests/e2e/assistant/intent_replay_test.go (+9/-1) adds -buildvcs=false to the required replay E2E's OWN go build ./cmd/core so the CLI builds under the container-mounted repo tree (error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128). STEP-0 blockers both cleared: no spec069 collision (fix already on main; spec069 does not touch intent_replay_test.go), and the buildvcs failure is IN-BOUNDARY (the test's own build, in scopes.md Implementation Files). test/regression RE-VERIFIED live this session: the buildvcs RED->fix->GREEN (RED both required replay E2E FAIL with exit status 128 at intent_replay_test.go:187/:224, REPLAY_E2E_EXIT=1; GREEN both PASS + broad assistant package ok 46.779s, GREEN_ASSISTANT_PKG_EXIT=0) plus a non-disruptive aggregate-loader source revert-reverify (RED detach loadIntentTraceConfig -> live wiring contract FAILs assistant_intent_trace_wiring_contract_test.go:36, UNIT_SSTWIRING_RED_EXIT=1; GREEN byte-exact git checkout restore -> PASS, UNIT_SSTWIRING_GREEN_EXIT=0) plus the config/adversarial contracts (UNIT_INTENTTRACE_EXIT=0) and full go units (FULL_GO_UNITS_EXIT=0); simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews (single test-harness build flag, no production surface, clean disposable-stack teardown, good-neighbor); security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance plus this session's guard-backed reconciliation (state-transition-guard PASS, artifact-lint exit 0). The sibling spec062_http_missing_key_test.go buildvcs pattern is out of boundary, dispositioned DI-071-002-01.

executionHistory.summary: Root-cause SST wiring (both missing integration edges) is already the committed 8ac848e1 (ancestor of HEAD, sstwiring_ancestor_exit=0): scripts/commands/config.sh (+14) reads and emits all five ASSISTANT_INTENT_TRACE_* keys, and internal/config/assistant.go (+5) calls loadIntentTraceConfig(cfg, &errs) at line 465 in aggregate assistant loading. This session's single in-boundary change: tests/e2e/assistant/intent_replay_test.go (+9/-1) adds -buildvcs=false to the required replay E2E's own go build -o <bin> ./cmd/core (runReplayCLI, line 130) so the CLI builds under the container-mounted repo tree (git dubious-ownership makes VCS stamping fail with exit status 128). Test-harness-only change; no replay algorithm semantics, trace schema, migration, deployment, release-train, or secret surface touched (design.md Excluded). STEP-0: no spec069 collision (fix already on main; spec069's diff does not include intent_replay_test.go) and the buildvcs go build is IN-BOUNDARY (the test's own build, in scopes.md Implementation Files).

Current-session genuine RED->fix->GREEN (good-neighbor block-wait on the shared suite lock; no foreign stack evicted; clean teardown). buildvcs edge: RED both required replay E2E FAIL 'error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128 / Use -buildvcs=false' at intent_replay_test.go:187/:224 (REPLAY_E2E_EXIT=1, the stack came up and seeded the trace; only the go build fails); GREEN after -buildvcs=false both PASS (TestIntentReplayE2E_ReproducesRouteAndToolCallsWithoutSideEffects 2.94s + TestIntentReplayE2E_UnknownTraceIDExits2 2.10s). Aggregate-loader edge (non-disruptive source revert-reverify, unit-only): RED detach loadIntentTraceConfig(cfg, &errs) -> TestIntentTraceSSTWiringContract_LiveGeneratorAndLoader FAILs at assistant_intent_trace_wiring_contract_test.go:36 'aggregate assistant loader does not invoke loadIntentTraceConfig' (UNIT_SSTWIRING_RED_EXIT=1); GREEN byte-exact git checkout HEAD -- internal/config/assistant.go -> PASS (UNIT_SSTWIRING_GREEN_EXIT=0, tree now shows only the in-boundary intent_replay_test.go change). Config + adversarial contracts: TestIntentTraceConfigRequiresEverySSTKey + LiveGeneratorAndLoader + AdversarialRejectsMissingReplayEmission + AdversarialRejectsDetachedLoader all PASS (UNIT_INTENTTRACE_EXIT=0). Evidence in report.md Test Evidence.

Current-session broader regression leg: ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant -> full assistant package GREEN (ok github.com/smackerel/smackerel/tests/e2e/assistant 46.779s, PASS: go-e2e, GREEN_ASSISTANT_PKG_EXIT=0); both repaired replay scenarios and every neighboring in-boundary assistant flow are GREEN. Full Go units GREEN (FULL_GO_UNITS_EXIT=0). The one package skip (intent_side_effect_test.go:64, LLM list-write classification nondeterminism) is a pre-existing skip in a DIFFERENT intent-compiler test, not a failure. Discovered issue: the sibling tests/e2e/spec062_http_missing_key_test.go:65 has the same latent bare go build pattern (out of boundary) -> dispositioned DI-071-002-01 (G051/G095), not touched. No product regression; no findings to route.

n/a with provenance. Bounded review: this session's change is a single test-harness build flag (-buildvcs=false) on the required replay E2E's own go build. No new production type, abstraction, provider registry, indirection, or fallback introduced; no production intent-trace code touched. Nothing to simplify - the change removes a build-environment failure mode, not adds surface.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: test-support-only change; zero production-image / Compose / container-lifecycle / schema / NATS / migration change. The disposable stack was torn down cleanly on exit in the live E2E leg (Network smackerel-test_default Removed - good-neighbor block-wait, no foreign stack evicted). No shared-fixture coupling introduced. -buildvcs=false only disables VCS metadata stamping on a throwaway test binary; runtime behavior is identical.
